rows.label: tlk44100184_02_msg0001
rows.name:
Outlanders! Hey listen, apparently
when I'm older I'll be allowed
to leave Luxuria too!

rows.label: tlk44100184_02_msg0002
rows.name:
I love plants. I read about
them in a library encyclopedia.
I want to go find them all!

rows.label: tlk44100184_02_msg0003
rows.name:
Before I grow up, I need to
find all Luxurian plants I
haven't discovered yet!
